Sheet: /Reform 2 Power/
File: reform2-power.kicad_sch

ambiguities.description: The exact pin assignments of Q1, Q2, Q15, Q17 gate connections to U2 BG1/TG1/BG2/TG2 could not be fully traced due to density; assignments inferred from LTC4020 typical circuit topology.
R182, R183 LED current limiting resistors for CHG_STAT LEDs — refdes R183 not in grounding set; may be R182 for one and an alternate refdes for other. Possibly R184 not in set.

Multiple resistor refdes (R10-R24) appear duplicated in grounding list and image — some are Vgs gate resistors for battery balancer FETs (Q5-Q12) and some are battery voltage dividers; exact refdes mapping for each is uncertain due to density.
U4 LTC6803-4 cell voltage sense pins (S0-S12, C0-C11) routing to battery cell nodes not fully traceable in this image due to density — partial net labels only.
SW1 and SW2 net connections (charge mode selection) not clearly readable from image — pins left without net labels.
Q4 PMV50ENEAR gate resistor network and connection to NTC/SHDN not fully traceable; R95 and R172 connections uncertain.

The D25/D26 LED refdes in grounding set clash with D25/D26 PMEG60T10ELR diodes also in the grounding set — schematic appears to use both, page is dense; only PMEG diodes and separate LED symbols can be confirmed but their exact refdes are ambiguous at this scale.
